description: NFC reader model: pn5180 (default) or pn532
mDNS/WiFi hostname (default spoolsense; max 32 chars; lowercase alphanum + hyphens)
Moonraker URL for Klipper integration (e.g. http://printer.local:7125)
Keep WiFi always awake: faster scans / more power (default 0)
Bambu AMS dashboard view enabled (1) or disabled (0)
Snapmaker U1 direct mode enabled (1) or disabled (0)
